title: HEALTH AND FITNESS - 211info
text: BOYS & GIRLS CLUB OF WESTERN LANE COUNTY HEALTH AND FITNESS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Focuses on improving the overall health of Club Members by increasing their daily physical activity through recreational activities and team sports, providing nutrition education, and helping them develop healthy relationships. 1501 Airport Road Florence, OR 97439 Eligibility: Ages 6-18 Hours: Monday-Friday 1:30pm-5:30pm Teacher In-Service Days and Summer Program: Monday-Friday 9am-5:30pm Email (541) 902-0304 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 902-0304 Main phone Main phone (541) 902-0304 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: $25 per year base membership fee After-School program: $50 per month Summer program: $100 per week DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Cities of Florence and Mapleton SITE HOURS: After-School program: Monday-Friday 3pm-5:30pm Summer program: Monday-Friday 9am-5:30pm, hours may vary Services: General Recreational Activities/Sports Nutrition Education Team Sports/Leagues Other Services Offered At This Location: SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - BOYS & GIRLS CLUB If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
